title: Let's start anew.
content:
I spent a good part of yesterday looking for a photo blogging solution. I tried several PHP scripts and even look at the WordPress + plugins way. I didn't like any of them. I didn't really want a super complicated, super detailed photo blog. I just want to post some photos. (Being able to show EXIF data is good, but not really necessary. I'm not that good when it comes to photography anyway.)

Then I recalled good old **tumblr.** Simple enough when it comes to posting photo. I can also post everything else too.

So here it is, everything else that might not belong to the [breadcrumb](https://macsf.net/breadcrumb/). Everything else I picked up along the **byway**.
